env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db add 'Always use gopls for Go code' --tags 'go,tooling'
stdout 'Stored'
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db list
stdout 'gopls'
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db add 'Use cobra for CLI' --tags 'go,cli'
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db stats
stdout 'Total:'
stdout '2'
